user.title: Robot Mower Yard
user.description: Add a yard/location first, then add mower providers to that yard.

yard.title: Yard/location
yard.description: Create a yard that can aggregate one or more mower providers. Zones are setup-only data and can be changed later from this yard entry's Configure screen.

provider.title: Mower provider
provider.description: Attach one mower data provider to an existing yard.

entity_provider.title: Existing HA entities
entity_provider.description: Create one mower from existing Home Assistant entities. All entity fields are optional for this prototype.

husqvarna_provider.title: Husqvarna Automower
husqvarna_provider.description: Prototype setup for a Husqvarna Automower provider. This validates the setup flow shape; API validation is not wired yet.

navimow_provider.title: Navimow
navimow_provider.description: Sign in with Navimow to connect live mower data.

abort.already_configured: This yard or provider is already configured.
abort.no_yards: Create a Robot Mower Yard location before adding a provider.

init.title: Yard setup
init.description: Zones are maintained here rather than in the sidebar. They are expected to be edited rarely after initial setup.

navimow.title: Navimow provider setup
navimow.description: Set the base station location if Navimow reports mower positions as relative x/y offsets.

abort.provider_options_not_supported: Provider options are not implemented in this prototype.
